methodsAttempted.notes: Fetched robots.txt from the official UniPG domain. Public pages and /files/ PDF paths used here are not disallowed; /contenuti/, administrator, cache, plugin, and component paths were avoided.

methodsAttempted.query: site:unipg.it (ChatGPT OR "intelligenza artificiale generativa" OR "IA generativa" OR "generative AI") (studenti OR didattica OR esami OR linee guida OR policy OR privacy) "Università degli Studi di Perugia"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned the official UniPG GenAI policy PDF, official decalogue PDF, the official regulations index, and weaker procurement/course/news results.

methodsAttempted.query: site:unipg.it ("Intelligenza Artificiale" OR "ChatGPT") ("Linee guida" OR "policy" OR "regolamento" OR "didattica" OR "studenti" OR "privacy")
methodsAttempted.notes: Official-domain search confirmed the central policy and decalogue as the only high-specificity university-level guidance sources found.

methodsAttempted.query: site:unipg.it filetype:pdf (ChatGPT OR "intelligenza artificiale" OR "IA generativa") (studenti OR didattica OR privacy OR esami)
methodsAttempted.notes: PDF search found the policy and decalogue plus scholarly, course, and seminar PDFs that were not used as university policy evidence.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a university-level Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa, a linked Decalogo Istituzionale di Sintesi Operativa, and the official UniPG regulations index showing the policy was issued with D.R. n. 3123 del 3/12/2025. Procurement, course, and seminar hits were rejected as low-specificity or non-policy evidence.

artifacts.claimText: The University of Perugia has an official institutional policy on the ethical and responsible use of generative artificial intelligence, listed in its official regulations index as issued with D.R. n. 3123 of 3 December 2025.

citation.citationTitle: Statuto e regolamenti - Università degli Studi di Perugia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UniPG states that its GenAI policy applies to students, teaching staff, researchers, language experts, tutors, technical-administrative staff, and library staff, and that GenAI should support rather than replace human critical judgment.

citation.citationTitle: Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa dell'Università degli Studi di Perugia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UniPG says every substantial use of GenAI must be declared and verifiable; for students, when AI use is allowed and substantial, it must be explicitly declared.

citation.citationTitle: Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa dell'Università degli Studi di Perugia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UniPG says users may not insert or process copyright-covered materials, sensitive or confidential personal information, or other intellectual property on third-party AI platforms unless the legitimate owners have explicitly authorized it.

citation.citationTitle: Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa dell'Università degli Studi di Perugia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UniPG says teaching staff who use AI tools should make the mode and intensity of use explicit in the syllabus and communicate GenAI-use limits to students.

citation.citationTitle: Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa dell'Università degli Studi di Perugia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UniPG says students may use AI for a first draft or text reformulation if declared, but may not present an entirely AI-produced work as their own without personal contribution and adequate indication.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa dell'Università degli Studi di Perugia
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ogni uso sostanziale della GenAI deve essere dichiarato e verificabile. Quando l'uso dell'IA è consentito e sostanziale ... le studentesse e gli studenti devono dichiararlo in modo esplicito.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Every substantial use of GenAI must be declared and verifiable; when students' AI use is allowed and substantial, they must explicitly declare it.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa dell'Università degli Studi di Perugia

artifacts.sourceTitle: Policy per l'Uso Etico e Responsabile dell'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa dell'Università degli Studi di Perugia
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Non è permesso inserire o elaborare materiale ... coperto da copyright, informazioni personali sensibili o riservate, né altre proprietà intellettuali ... su piattaforme di IA gestite da terze parti a meno che i legittimi proprietari ne abbiano dato esplicita autorizzazione.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The policy prohibits inserting or processing copyright-covered material, sensitive or confidential personal information, or other intellectual property on third-party AI platforms unless the legitimate owners have explicitly authorized it.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Il docente che decide di avvalersi di tali strumenti ne renderà esplicita la modalità e l'intensità in Syllabus. ... il personale docente ... si impegna a comunicare ... i limiti di utilizzo di strumenti GenAI.

artifacts.title: Università degli Studi di Perugia GenAI policy staging draft
artifacts.summary: Staged claims identify UniPG's official GenAI policy status and narrow policy rules for substantial-use declaration, privacy/copyright restrictions on third-party AI platforms, teaching syllabus/limit communication, and student academic-integrity boundaries.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Course pages, procurement records, seminar pages, and scholarly article PDFs were not used as policy evidence.
All claims remain agent-reviewed staged candidates and are not public canonical claims.
